scripts.clean: rimraf allure-results allure-results-chrome allure-results-firefox allure-report reports
scripts.test:report:retry: npm run clean:results && npm run test:allure:retry && npm run allure:generate && npm run dashboard:browser
scripts.test:report:retry:open: npm run clean:results && npm run test:allure:retry && npm run allure:generate && npm run dashboard:browser && npm run allure:open:detached
scripts.test:headless:report: npm run clean:results && npm run test:headless && npm run allure:generate && npm run allure:open:detached
scripts.test: npx cucumber-js src/features/**/*.feature --require-module ts-node/register --require src/core/world.ts --require src/hooks/**/*.ts --require src/steps/**/*.ts --format progress
scripts.test:retry: npx cucumber-js src/features/**/*.feature --retry 1 --require-module ts-node/register --require src/core/world.ts --require src/hooks/**/*.ts --require src/steps/**/*.ts --format progress
scripts.test:allure:min: npx cucumber-js src/features/**/*.feature --require-module ts-node/register --require src/core/world.ts --require src/hooks/**/*.ts --require src/steps/**/*.ts --format allure-cucumberjs/reporter
scripts.test:allure: npx cucumber-js src/features/**/*.feature --require-module ts-node/register --require src/core/world.ts --require src/hooks/**/*.ts --require src/steps/**/*.ts --format progress --format allure-cucumberjs/reporter
scripts.test:allure:retry: npx cucumber-js src/features/**/*.feature --retry 1 --require-module ts-node/register --require src/core/world.ts --require src/hooks/**/*.ts --require src/steps/**/*.ts --format progress --format allure-cucumberjs/reporter
scripts.test:allure:chrome: cross-env TEST_BROWSER=chromium TEST_HEADLESS=false ALLURE_RESULTS_DIR=allure-results-chrome npx cucumber-js src/features/**/*.feature --retry 1 --require-module ts-node/register --require src/core/world.ts --require src/hooks/**/*.ts --require src/steps/**/*.ts --format progress --format allure-cucumberjs/reporter
scripts.test:allure:firefox: cross-env TEST_BROWSER=firefox TEST_HEADLESS=false ALLURE_RESULTS_DIR=allure-results-firefox npx cucumber-js src/features/**/*.feature --retry 1 --require-module ts-node/register --require src/core/world.ts --require src/hooks/**/*.ts --require src/steps/**/*.ts --format progress --format allure-cucumberjs/reporter
scripts.test:headed:chrome: cross-env TEST_BROWSER=chromium TEST_HEADLESS=false npx cucumber-js src/features/**/*.feature --retry 1 --require-module ts-node/register --require src/core/world.ts --require src/hooks/**/*.ts --require src/steps/**/*.ts --format progress
scripts.test:headed:firefox: cross-env TEST_BROWSER=firefox TEST_HEADLESS=false npx cucumber-js src/features/**/*.feature --retry 1 --require-module ts-node/register --require src/core/world.ts --require src/hooks/**/*.ts --require src/steps/**/*.ts --format progress
scripts.debug:firefox: cross-env TEST_BROWSER=firefox TEST_HEADLESS=false npx cucumber-js src/features/**/*.feature --retry 0 --require-module ts-node/register --require src/core/world.ts --require src/hooks/**/*.ts --require src/steps/**/*.ts --format progress
scripts.allure:report: npm run allure:generate && npm run allure:open
scripts.test:report:chrome: npm run clean:results:chrome && npm run clean:results && npm run test:allure:chrome && npm run allure:merge && npm run allure:generate && npm run dashboard:browser
scripts.test:report:firefox: npm run clean:results:firefox && npm run clean:results && npm run test:allure:firefox && npm run allure:merge && npm run allure:generate && npm run dashboard:browser
scripts.test:report:multibrowser: npm run clean:results:chrome && npm run clean:results:firefox && npm run clean:results && npm run test:multibrowser && npm run allure:merge && npm run allure:generate && npm run dashboard:browser
scripts.test:report:multibrowser:open: npm run clean:results:chrome && npm run clean:results:firefox && npm run clean:results && npm run test:multibrowser && npm run allure:merge && npm run allure:generate && npm run dashboard:browser && npm run allure:open:detached
scripts.test:allure:chrome:parallel: cross-env TEST_BROWSER=chromium TEST_HEADLESS=false ALLURE_RESULTS_DIR=allure-results-chrome npx cucumber-js src/features/**/*.feature --parallel 2 --retry 1 --require-module ts-node/register --require src/core/world.ts --require src/hooks/**/*.ts --require src/steps/**/*.ts --format progress --format allure-cucumberjs/reporter
scripts.test:allure:firefox:parallel: cross-env TEST_BROWSER=firefox TEST_HEADLESS=false ALLURE_RESULTS_DIR=allure-results-firefox npx cucumber-js src/features/**/*.feature --parallel 2 --retry 1 --require-module ts-node/register --require src/core/world.ts --require src/hooks/**/*.ts --require src/steps/**/*.ts --format progress --format allure-cucumberjs/reporter
scripts.debug:firefox:headed: cross-env TEST_BROWSER=firefox TEST_HEADLESS=false npx cucumber-js src/features/**/*.feature --parallel 1 --retry 0 --require-module ts-node/register --require src/core/world.ts --require src/hooks/**/*.ts --require src/steps/**/*.ts --format progress
scripts.test:parallel: concurrently -k -n chrome,firefox "npm run test:allure:chrome:parallel" "npm run test:allure:firefox:parallel"
scripts.test:report:parallel: npm run clean:results:chrome && npm run clean:results:firefox && npm run clean:results && npm run test:parallel && npm run allure:merge && npm run allure:generate && npm run dashboard:browser
scripts.test:report:parallel:open: npm run clean:results:chrome && npm run clean:results:firefox && npm run clean:results && npm run test:parallel && npm run allure:merge && npm run allure:generate && npm run dashboard:browser && npm run allure:open:detached
scripts.test:local: cross-env ENV=local npx cucumber-js src/features/**/*.feature --require-module ts-node/register --require src/core/world.ts --require src/hooks/**/*.ts --require src/steps/**/*.ts --format progress
scripts.test:staging: cross-env ENV=staging npx cucumber-js src/features/**/*.feature --require-module ts-node/register --require src/core/world.ts --require src/hooks/**/*.ts --require src/steps/**/*.ts --format progress
scripts.test:prod: cross-env ENV=prod npx cucumber-js src/features/**/*.feature --require-module ts-node/register --require src/core/world.ts --require src/hooks/**/*.ts --require src/steps/**/*.ts --format progress
scripts.test:staging:firefox: cross-env ENV=staging TEST_BROWSER=firefox npx cucumber-js src/features/**/*.feature --require-module ts-node/register --require src/core/world.ts --require src/hooks/**/*.ts --require src/steps/**/*.ts --format progress
